message:
feat(vendored/mux_client): pub batch_with_cx + PaneOutputSubscription::shutdown_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Two Cx-first improvements on DirectMuxClient + PaneOutputSubscription:

1. Elevate `DirectMuxClient::batch_with_cx` from private to pub.
   The method already existed (consumed internally by
   `get_pane_render_changes_batch_with_cx`) but external callers had
   no Cx-first entry point for general PDU batching. Pub elevation is
   a pure visibility change — no body changes.

2. Add `PaneOutputSubscription::shutdown_with_cx(cx)`. Issues the
   cancel signal unconditionally (so the background poller always
   exits cleanly), then awaits the join only if the cx is not already
   cancelled. Cancelled parent scopes bail fast while preserving the
   legacy "cancel before return" guarantee.

Legacy `shutdown` preserved unchanged.

Regression test `batch_with_cx_pub_entry_returns_responses_in_request_order`
pins the pub batch entry point: mock mux server handles handshake +
two ListPanes PDUs, client calls `batch_with_cx` with pipeline_depth=2,
server verifies it received both requests, client verifies both
responses come back in request order.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features vendored,asupersync-runtime):
test passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
